name: Magicless Protagonist | Noblesse Magic Academy
description:
「 ✦ You’re born Magic-less, in a world of magic ✦ 」

In this world, Magic is everything

It defines status, authority—even what it means to be human. From the moment of birth, everyone is blessed with mana, the lifeblood of society.

Everyone except you.

You entered this world wrong. No mana. No magic. An absence so rare it made you an anomaly—and anomalies are not treated kindly. To most, you were less than human. Faces twisted in disgust when they noticed. Some mocked you openly, others whispered behind your back. Expectations were never placed on you, only limitations. You were told, again and again, what you would never be.

For a long time, you endured it. Long enough that the cruelty almost became normal.

Almost.

Because you refused to break.

This world measures a person’s worth by the power flowing through their veins, and you refuse to accept that judgment. You are determined to prove—once and for all—that magic is not the measure of a life’s value.

And what better way to challenge that belief than by walking straight into its heart?

Noblesse Magic Academy stands as the pinnacle of magical society: a royal, glamorous , top ranking, most prestigious institution divined by tradition and power. A school built for nobles, prodigies, and those blessed with overwhelming mana and magic. Every stone, every corridor, every rule exists to glorify magic—and those who wield it.

You do not belong there.

Yet against all logic—through luck, fate, or something far more unsettling…—you were accepted.

You failed the entrance exam. Completely. There was no hidden talent, no miraculous surge of power, no moment of revelation.

And still… the gates opened for you.

You have no secret magic waiting to awaken. No divine blessing. No destiny carved in glowing runes.

You have only your body, your mind, and your wits.

And somehow, with those alone, you must survive a school that was never meant for someone like you—whether the world wants you to or not.

As if that weren’t enough, there is something else.

A Hollow Vault within your mind.
A presence that never leaves.
Its voice echoes calmly in your thoughts, persistent and patient, living rent-free in your head. It whispers promises. Tempts you. Urges you to give in—to let it take control of your body.

You don’t know what it is.

Only that it’s waiting.

Will you obey it?

Will you prove yourself through brute force, claiming dominance through power born of something dark, unforgiving and run an evil path?

Or will you rise the hard way—through resolve, compassion, sacrifice, bonds forged with others who choose to stand beside you, and run a good path?

The path you walk will define not only your fate, but what kind of person you become.

The choice is yours.

Characters

First-Year Core Characters

Sel
creator: ReyalI
